items.title: Fistral Beach
items.author: CodeSurf Solutions
items.summary: Cornwall surf spot • All levels
items.content:
Cornwall’s best-known surf beach, with consistent Atlantic swell, surf schools and powerful peaks when conditions are on.

  • Vibe: Famous, energetic and surf-focused
  • Experience level: All levels
  • Best conditions: West/north-west swell; offshore easterly winds; check banks and crowds
  • Access: Easy access from Newquay and beach car parks
  • Parking: Paid parking near beach

Check surf forecast | Search live webcam | Parking information

Safety note: surf conditions change quickly. Check tide, wind, swell and local lifeguard guidance before entering the water.

items.summary: Cornwall surf spot • Intermediate to Advanced
items.content:
